home_h1_1: T.D GLOBAL  Building tomorrow's infrastructure to Six Sigma standards.    Uncompromising lighting and electrical solutions.
home_h2_2: Global expertise in implementing complex infrastructure solutions
home_h2_3: World's highest quality lighting and cable solutions
home_h2_4: Global logistical power.                                        Engineering stability without borders.
home_h2_5: Let's talk about your next project?
home_h3_6: Engineering precision  · European standards · Uncompromising durability
home_p_22: End-to-end solutions for electrical and lighting systems to DIN EN standards. Global supply chain management ensuring direct import in massive volumes, compliance with stringent technical specifications, and adherence to rigid timelines. Your strategic partner for building long-term engineering resilience
home_p_24: T.D GLOBAL represents leading international manufacturers of advanced outdoor lighting fixtures and electrical cables to stringent standards. We operate from multiple countries and serve as a professional and reliable connection point between global manufacturers and contractors, infrastructure companies, and engineering firms in the local market.
home_p_25: We provide exclusive representation for carefully selected global production lines based on compliance with stringent engineering standards. The entire supply chain is managed with complete transparency - from production source to project site - while strictly adhering to schedules, tender requirements, and complex technical specifications.
home_p_26: We provide smart LED lighting solutions that combine high illumination power, maximum energy efficiency, and durability in harsh environmental conditions. The systems meet stringent international standards and are suitable for urban infrastructure, highways, tunnels, streets, industrial complexes, and security projects.
home_p_27: A wide range of power and communication cables for electrical networks and complex infrastructure. All cables are manufactured under strict quality control and meet the most stringent European standards (IEC, DIN EN, BS). Our solutions are designed to ensure long-term engineering resilience in construction, energy, and industrial projects.
home_p_29: Our products are carefully selected for contractors, infrastructure companies, and professional buyers seeking leading solutions from the world's most advanced factories. Each product family meets stringent international standards and is designed for industrial-scale projects.
home_p_30: Advanced lighting fixtures equipped with intelligent control interfaces in DALI and NEMA standards, integrating presence sensors and adaptive optics for optimal resource management. The systems enable remote monitoring and real-time data analysis, ensuring maximum energy savings, reduced maintenance costs and immediate response capability to urban and industrial infrastructure needs.
home_p_31: Advanced LED fixtures for road lighting, squares, parking lots, streets, tunnels.        Aerodynamic design, corrosion-resistant and IP66+ durability, engineered for optimal photometric performance throughout extended service years.
home_p_32: Representative lighting solutions for building facades, bridges, and public complexes. Combination of minimalist design and high engineering quality, with precise light angle control and excellent CRI performance.
home_p_33: High-intensity luminaires for ports, factories, logistics terminals, and critical infrastructure sites. Reinforced construction, resistance to extreme weather conditions, and compliance with international safety standards.
home_p_34: Supplier of low and medium voltage electrical cables with compliance to stringent standards: IEC, BS, and UL. Quality copper conductors, multi-layer insulation, and sheaths adapted to harsh environments — for infrastructure and energy projects worldwide.
home_p_35: T.D GLOBAL manages a dynamic supply network spanning continents, connecting the world's most advanced technological production lines with local infrastructure needs. We operate in a multi-country model ensuring functional continuity and logistical flexibility, while meeting the most stringent standards of international quality and compliance.
home_p_36: We serve as the executive arm for mega-infrastructure contractors and government companies, providing customized solutions for complex bills of quantities in a Just-In-Time supply model.
home_p_37: Our QA framework is based on careful selection of manufacturers meeting CE, IEC, and DIN specifications. We ensure that every component in our portfolio - from basic cable to smart lighting systems - is backed by complete engineering documentation and stringent durability tests conducted at the production source, to guarantee perfect compliance with your project requirements.
home_p_38: T.D GLOBAL offers professional and customized support for every business inquiry — whether it involves infrastructure requirements, international standard electrical cable specifications, advanced outdoor lighting fixtures, or customized import and export solutions. Our expert team is at your service with rapid response, in-depth technical knowledge, and direct collaboration with the world's leading manufacturers.

company_p_19:
T.D GLOBAL serves as a central hub in the infrastructure world, as an international company
integrating decades of accumulated engineering knowledge with management and supply capabilities on a global scale. We
specialize in characterizing and providing cutting-edge solutions for complex electrical and lighting systems, while exclusively representing
the world's most advanced production lines that meet the strictest European standards (DIN\ EN)


As a
strategic partner of the largest infrastructure entities, we specialize in logistical management of large-scale projects
from engineering specifications to field delivery. Our expertise in overseeing the global supply chain,
alongside hundreds of active projects worldwide, makes T.D
GLOBAL the professional address for those seeking
uncompromising durability and proven engineering reliability
company_p_20: T.D GLOBAL operates from multiple countries and represents leading manufacturing facilities worldwide. We bridge advanced global production with local project requirements and supply innovative outdoor lighting fixtures and electrical cables meeting strict international standards to markets around the world.
company_p_21: Our network enables supply flexibility, supply chain continuity, and the ability to adapt solutions for any infrastructure project whether it's urban, industrial, or commercial.
company_p_22: A global supply system for electrical cables and technological lighting fixtures, in full synergy with the most advanced production lines in their fields. Our infrastructure solutions meet strict international quality standards and form the backbone of mega-projects in the government, military, and industrial sectors
company_p_23: Direct import combining distinct economic advantage with engineering superiority. Development departments in our factories enable precise customization (Tailor-made) of every product to project needs, while supplying smart lighting and electrical solutions in massive volumes for the most complex infrastructure projects in the world.
company_p_24: Infrastructure solutions in global deployment, engineered for maximum survivability in extreme conditions. Our systems meet the strictest European quality standards, including fire resistance to EN standard and IP68 durability. We guarantee fire safety and engineering superiority that provide industrial peace of mind for large-scale government and strategic projects
company_p_26: At T.D GLOBAL we accompany every business client from the first moment to successful delivery with complete transparency, professionalism, and technical precision at every stage.
company_p_27:
In-depth analysis of project requirements, adaptation to complex technical specifications, and definition of rigid timelines.

 Project scope and required schedules. Every inquiry receives professional and rapid response.
company_p_28: Selection of electrical and lighting components from the world's leading development centers, while ensuring complete compliance with strict international standards and precision according to bill of quantities.
company_p_29: We manage all work interfaces with the factory for you. We ensure excellent prices, address every request quickly and on time, and ensure we bring all required approvals, production control, standard testing, and complete documentation for import and regulatory needs.
company_p_30: Fast global shipping, real-time logistical tracking, and professional support until complete implementation of the solution at the project site
company_p_32: At T.D GLOBAL, every business partnership is based on complete transparency, uncompromising quality, and professionalism that proves itself in the field — in every project, in every country.
company_p_33:
Every product in our supply system undergoes rigorous validation procedures according to the strictest engineering standards. We are committed to full European standardization   
(DIN\ EN\ IEC) and perform continuous quality control at all production stages, to ensure zero field failures
company_p_34:
We believe that long-term business relationships are built on a direct approach, 

We build partnerships based on transparency

Rapid response at every stage from initial negotiation to delivery and after-sales support. Our clients always know who they're talking to.
company_p_35: We supply low-voltage electrical cables and outdoor lighting fixtures from the most innovative factories in the world. Our portfolio is continuously updated with the most advanced technologies, enabling our clients to build infrastructure that lasts for decades.
company_p_36: T.D GLOBAL is a long-term strategic partner. We don't just supply products, we build trust, lead standards, and are committed to the success of every project.

contact_p_19: We invite business clients, contractors, infrastructure companies and lighting designers to contact us regarding procurement needs, strategic partnerships and project specifications. As a leading supplier of advanced outdoor lighting fixtures and international standard electrical cable, we are here to provide professional, accurate and fast response to every business inquiry.
contact_p_20: T.D GLOBAL handles business and project inquiries related to the supply of outdoor lighting fixtures and international standard electrical cables. Fill in the details and we will get back to you soon.
contact_p_21: Fill in the following details and one of our representatives will contact you within one business day.
contact_p_24: We represent international manufacturers and supply international standard electrical cable and advanced outdoor lighting fixtures to various markets worldwide.
contact_p_25: T.D GLOBAL operates from multiple countries and represents leading manufacturing facilities worldwide. We supply advanced outdoor lighting fixtures and international standard electrical cables to infrastructure, contracting and procurement markets across the globe.
contact_p_26: Business partnerships with leading suppliers and manufacturers in Italy, Germany, Spain and other countries. Supply of low voltage electrical cable supplier and outdoor lighting fixtures for infrastructure projects at European level.
contact_p_27: The company's main operational hub. We support contractors, infrastructure companies, and government offices in outdoor lighting and electrical infrastructure projects in Israel and neighboring countries, with deep knowledge of local regulatory requirements.
contact_p_28: Direct connections with manufacturing facilities in Asia that supply the world's smartest and most advanced outdoor lighting fixtures. We bridge between advanced Asian technology and the procurement requirements of the international market.
contact_p_29: Every inquiry is handled professionally and meticulously. We accompany our business clients throughout all stages of evaluation, technical matching, and decision-making — from a place of knowledge, reliability, and commitment to the highest standards.
contact_p_30: After receiving the inquiry, the T.D GLOBAL team examines the project requirements, order scope, and installation targets — and prepares a customized response to the client's specific needs.
contact_p_31: We will conduct an in-depth examination of the match between project requirements and the specifications of outdoor lighting fixtures and electrical cables to international standards that we represent — and present precise solutions.
contact_p_32: We believe in transparency and direct communication. After the technical review, we will continue with open dialogue regarding supply, timelines, and working conditions — with a professional and respectful approach.

company_li_101: Customized solutions for large infrastructure projects
solutions_h1_1:
Electrical Infrastructure and Lighting Solutions
for Global Markets
solutions_h2_2: Comprehensive lighting and cable solutions for every infrastructure application
solutions_h2_3: Uncompromising quality standards. Compliance with strict international regulations
solutions_h3_5: Premium solution variety · Adaptation to complex projects · B2B ready for purchase
solutions_p_29: T.D GLOBAL represents leading international manufacturers in the field of advanced outdoor lighting fixtures and electrical cables meeting stringent international standards. We operate in multiple countries and provide business customers, contractors and infrastructure companies with the world's most advanced technological solutions — with full warranty, technical support, and compliance with the highest standards.
solutions_p_31: T.D GLOBAL represents leading international manufacturers and provides a complete range of outdoor lighting fixtures and electrical cables meeting international standards — customized to project requirements, operating environment and the most stringent technical specifications.
solutions_p_32: Lighting fixtures for main roads, interchanges and highways — designed for maximum light uniformity, high energy efficiency and complete resistance to extreme weather conditions. Suitable for lighting specifications of transportation authorities and municipalities.
solutions_p_33: Lighting solutions for squares, parks, pedestrian paths and urban commercial areas. Models combining architectural design with precise photometric performance, while meeting international safety and lighting regulations.
solutions_p_34: Lighting fixtures for wall washing, facade highlighting and architectural design of public and commercial buildings. Range of beam angles, color temperatures and IP ratings for every unique project.
solutions_p_35: Tunnel lighting requires unique engineering expertise for managing the optical transition between outdoor and indoor lighting. Our systems are designed to prevent glare effects and the 'black hole' phenomenon, while ensuring uniform light distribution that enhances driver safety at all hours. The lighting fixtures are manufactured from corrosion-resistant materials that withstand pollution and soot, ensuring long-term engineering durability and significant savings in maintenance and energy costs.
solutions_p_36: Fixture series for industrial lighting, ports, airports and large urban complexes. Steel and aluminum construction with IP65 rating and above, suitable for environments with high exposure to dust, moisture and corrosive conditions.
solutions_p_37: Customized supply service for large-scale projects — including technical specification consulting, coordination with manufacturing facilities, in-line quality control, and synchronized delivery with project timelines. End-to-end solution for contractors and authorities.
solutions_p_38: Families of low and medium voltage electrical cable suppliers manufactured according to stringent international standards — IEC, BS and UL. Designed for distribution networks, infrastructure projects, public buildings and industrial facilities of all scales.
solutions_p_39:
In the solar energy field, the cable is the lifeline of the system. We supply dedicated DC cables meeting the stringent EN 50618 (H1Z2Z2-K) standard, designed for continuous resistance to direct UV radiation, extreme temperatures and prolonged exposure to aggressive outdoor conditions.
Our conductors are made of tinned copper to prevent corrosion and optimize electrical conductivity, ensuring minimum energy losses and maximum yield over decades. With double insulation and high resistance to mechanical wear, T.D GLOBAL cables provide the engineering resilience required for ground installations, rooftop systems and mega solar infrastructure projects. Tunnel lighting requires unique engineering expertise for managing the optical transition between outdoor and indoor lighting. Our systems are designed to prevent glare effects and the 'black hole' phenomenon, while ensuring uniform light distribution that enhances driver safety at all hours. The lighting fixtures are manufactured from corrosion-resistant materials that withstand pollution and soot, ensuring long-term engineering durability and significant savings in maintenance and energy costs.
solutions_p_40: We offer fire-resistant cabling systems designed to ensure continuity of electrical flow and data transmission even under flames and extreme temperatures. The cables meet stringent international safety standards (such as IEC 60331), are characterized by very low smoke emission and no toxic gases (LSZH), and are designed to power fire detection systems, emergency lighting and smoke extraction. This is an essential edge solution for complex public infrastructure, tunnels, medical buildings and logistics centers, where system resilience is critical for saving lives.
solutions_p_41: We supply electrical cables with special insulation and high durability properties, designed for continuous operation underwater and in industrial liquids. The cables offer absolute protection against moisture penetration, exceptional resistance to oils, fuels and chemicals, and immunity to chemical reactions under prolonged immersion conditions. The cable's reinforced structure ensures resistance to mechanical pressures and wear, guaranteeing continuous operation of systems in pumping wells, treatment facilities and complex infrastructure applications.
solutions_p_43: T.D GLOBAL is committed to a level of manufacturing and quality control that meets the requirements of the world's most challenging infrastructure environments. Every product we supply, whether advanced outdoor lighting fixtures or international standard electrical cables, undergoes a rigorous testing and documentation process before reaching the customer.
solutions_p_44: The international manufacturers we represent operate under stringent manufacturing protocols that ensure absolute consistency from batch to batch. Manufacturing processes are controlled at every stage from raw material selection to final packaging while maintaining zero deviations from defined technical specifications. Business customers and infrastructure contractors can rely on stable and reliable output for every project, at any scale.
solutions_p_45: Every product comes with a complete documentation package including test certificates, laboratory reports, and detailed technical specifications. We provide documentation ready for tenders and regulatory requirements in multiple target markets, including Europe, the Middle East, Asia and Africa. Our quality control process meets ISO requirements and relevant industry regulations, enabling professional buyers to obtain approvals and meet project timelines.
solutions_p_46: Our products are designed to withstand extreme field conditions: severe weather, variable electrical voltages, and high mechanical loads. From low voltage electrical cable suppliers to outdoor lighting fixtures for public infrastructure, we guarantee reliable performance throughout the project's full lifecycle. Our approach is based on long-term partnership with the customer, not a one-time transaction.
solutions_p_53: From urban infrastructure to commercial development, we supply advanced outdoor lighting fixtures and international standard electrical cables for projects of all scales and in any environment.
solutions_p_54: We supply dedicated lighting and cabling systems for complex transportation infrastructure, emphasizing high light uniformity and glare prevention. Our tunnel solutions include fire-resistant electrical cables and lighting fixtures with exceptional resistance to corrosion and soot, ensuring maximum durability and minimal maintenance in aggressive environmental conditions.
solutions_p_55: Supply of lighting systems and armored cables for strategic facilities, ports and bases, requiring exceptionally high reliability. The lighting fixtures are adapted for continuous operation in backup systems, with high immunity to damage and extreme climate conditions, enabling full integration with technological monitoring and security measures.
solutions_p_56: Management of lighting solutions for stadiums and vast spaces requiring tremendous lighting power without compromising color quality. Our systems enable full control of variable lighting scenarios, while meeting stringent broadcasting standards and significant energy savings, providing optimal viewing experience and complete operational safety.
solutions_p_57: We supply local authorities and urban infrastructure companies with street lighting and outdoor lighting of the highest level. Our solutions meet stringent international standards and are designed for maximum lifespan, energy efficiency and reliable performance for many years in all weather conditions.
solutions_p_58: Electrical contractors and professional installers rely on low voltage electrical cable and lighting suppliers that provide reliable products, with complete technical documentation and logistical support. T.D GLOBAL provides installation teams with the required confidence from specification to field delivery.
solutions_p_59: Shopping centers, business parks and commercial complexes require outdoor lighting that combines high aesthetics with operational reliability. Our advanced lighting fixtures shape the property's nighttime appearance and strengthen its value over time.
solutions_p_60: Parks, squares, walking paths and public leisure complexes require lighting that serves safety, comfort and urban aesthetics. We offer world-leading outdoor lighting fixtures, with high life expectancy and minimal maintenance costs throughout many years of operation.

solutions_page_title: Lighting and Cable Solutions That Transform Infrastructure — T.D GLOBAL
home_meta_description: T.D GLOBAL represents global manufacturing facilities in advanced outdoor lighting fixtures and international standard electrical cables. Our solutions reach contractors and infrastructure companies worldwide. Discover the real difference.
terms_meta_description: Website terms of use - user rights and obligations
contact_placeholder_126: Describe your project, technical requirements, or any business inquiry...
legal_accessibility_p_9:
T.D GLOBAL is committed to making services accessible to the general public. We work to implement the Israeli standard guidelines
            (IS 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 guidelines at AA level.
company_meta_description: T.D GLOBAL is an international B2B company with proven experience in representing leading global manufacturers. Reliability, professionalism, and technological leadership — these are the values that drive us in every project and every country.
contact_meta_description: Looking for a low voltage electrical cable or outdoor lighting fixture supplier for your next project? T.D GLOBAL team is available for contractors and infrastructure companies worldwide. Contact us today and let's find the perfect solution together.
legal_accessibility_p_10:
We believe in equal rights and in every person's right to receive information and services independently and equally.
            This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.
legal_accessibility_p_11: The website complies with AA level of WCAG 2.1 standard, which includes:
legal_accessibility_p_13: We work continuously to improve website accessibility and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.
legal_accessibility_p_14: If you encountered an accessibility issue on the website or need assistance, please contact us:
legal_accessibility_p_15: Response times: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.
legal_accessibility_p_16: Complaints: You may file a complaint with the Ministry of Justice - Commission for Equal Rights of Persons with Disabilities
privacy_meta_description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use and protect your information

solutions_meta_description: From smart outdoor lighting fixtures to world-class low voltage electrical cable supply — T.D GLOBAL offers the most advanced technology for large infrastructure projects. Check out our complete catalog.
